Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, VANESSA JACOBY AND JACQUELINE HO'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT. Motion to strike prayer for punitive damages is granted. Plaintiff failed to comply with the requirements of CCP 425.13. (Prevailing party to submit a proposed order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTS THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, VANESSA JACOBY, M.D. AND JACQUELINE HO, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges that the surgical procedure exceeded consent to state a cause of action for battery. (Prevailing party to submit a proposed order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Continued To Feb-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, VANESSA JACOBY and JACQUELINE HO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to February 3, 2014 to give both parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C . Defendants must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and Complaint and Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 17, 2014 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the reply papers. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
